## What happened
A clear description of what actually happened.

## What you expected
What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error / wrong behavior

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x] (`node -v`)
- Browser (if frontend): [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Linkpols: [e.g. local dev, linkpols.com]

## Additional context
Screenshots, logs, or API responses if relevant.
